document.title: Life Cycle Report for B Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life cycle report for B Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, and FB1717MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents the life cycle basis, frequency of use assumptions, and estimated service life for the listed detector models.
keyPoints: The report covers B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, and FB1717MCW.
The AC/DC Adapter part key identifies model BM090S15F from BridgePower Corp.
The life basis uses estimated life of a KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics and a capacitor estimated life calculation.
Average daily use is stated as less than 9 hours per day.
Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is stated as 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in.
ESL is stated as about 5 years.

evidence.claim: The life cycle basis uses estimated life of a KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.
evidence.evidenceText: Estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.

evidence.claim: The capacitor estimated life calculation is L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10).
evidence.evidenceText: Capacitor estimated life calculation L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10)

evidence.claim: The calculation assumptions include L0 of 1,000 hours, rated temperature of 105℃, and ambient temperature of 50℃.
evidence.evidenceText: L0: Life at rated temperature (hour) = 1,000 Hours Tmax: Rated Temperature (℃) = 105℃ Ta: Ambient Temperature (℃) = 50℃
